description:
![xxxHOLiC-Kei_800.webp](https://img.2222.moe/images/2024/08/18/xxxHOLiC-Kei_800.webp)  
  
四月一日灵异事件簿·继 / xxxHOLiC Kei / xxxHOLiC◆继 DVDRip  
  
按理说本作画质应该好一些的，看起来制作上是没那么糙了，但是神奇的手段导致DVD观感某种程度上比第一季还差了，只能大炮开兮。顺便一说大概是因为只有租赁版放流所以特典全无。  
Logically, the visual quality of this work should be better, and it does appear that the production isn't as rough. However, some mysterious methods have made the DVD viewing experience, in some ways, even worse than the first season, leaving us no choice but to take a more aggressive approach. By the way, probably due to the availability of only the rental version, there are no bonus features included.

title: 狼と香辛料XIV～完全版オーディオブック (Spice and Wolf, Vol. 14 - Unabridged Japanese Audiobook)

description:
![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/8LLhfj0.png "狼と香辛料XIV")

銀細工師フランに北の地図を作ってもらえることになったロレンス。これでホロとヨイツまで行けると思ったのも束の間、再訪した町レノスで禁書にまつわる騒動に巻き込まれてしまう。その本にはヨイツを窮地に陥れる技術が記されているらしい。しかし禁書を手に入れようとすると、行商路に戻らねばならないロレンスは、ホロと一緒にヨイツへ向かう時間がなくなってしまう……。苦渋の決断を迫られたロレンスの出した結論とは!?
絶好調の新感覚ファンタジー、シリーズ第14弾！

Thanks to the silversmith Fran, Lawrence now has a map of the North. But Lawrence's gladness at the thought of finally being able to take Holo back to her home is short-lived, as upon revisiting Lenos he is embroiled in the strife surrounding a forbidden text. It is said that this mysterious book contains details of methods that threaten the land of Yoitsu itself. But in trying to get his hands on the book, Lawrence, who must return to the marketplace, finds himself running out of time to head for Yoitsu with Holo... Pressed into making a decision he may ultimately come to regret, which option will Lawrence choose?!

title: From Leveling Up the Hero to Leveling Up a Nation 001-047 as v01-09 (Digital-Compilation) (Square Enix) (Oak)
description:
**These are the digital store chapters released by Square Enix outside the Manga UP! App -- therefore these are tagged with (Square Enix).**
Chapters provided by DigitalMangaFan, denoised, grayscaled, and lossless optimized x2231 **PNG** images, split dual-pages are merged.

*These compiled volumes include raw pages from the Japanese volumes to keep the page count and numbering correct for ‘complete’ tank-style volumes.*
- These volumes start with **right-side page** first (no inner cover page), start with **two** pages on dual-view readers for correct page order.
- All image filenames are tagged and are having page numbers according to the ToC.

**FIXED: Volume 8 now contains raw extras to complete the compilation.**
**PRE Removal: All chapters in volume 9 are now digital chapters.**

----

Volumes 01-09 contain chapters 001-047.

title: The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten 001-013 as v01-03 (Digital-Compilation) (Square Enix) (Oak)
description:
**These are the digital store chapters released by Square Enix outside the Manga UP! App -- therefore these are tagged with (Square Enix).**
Chapters provided by DigitalMangaFan, denoised, grayscaled, and lossless optimized x2231 **PNG** images, split dual-pages are merged.

*These compiled volumes include raw pages from the Japanese volumes to keep the page count and numbering correct for ‘complete’ tank-style volumes.*
- These volumes start with **right-side page** first (no inner cover page), start with **two** pages on dual-view readers for correct page order.
- All image filenames are tagged and are having page numbers according to the ToC.
- The short story extras are left out as they are text only, page numbering in the filenames are skipped but correct offset is maintained.

**Fixed: Volumes 1 and 2 make now use of proper raws.**

*Note: This is a different translation than the official volumes released by SQUARE ENIX BOOKS USA.*

----

Volumes 01-03 contain chapters 001-013.

title: [Bereke Scrubs] Kamen Rider Kiva Music Videos [480p HS]
description:
This contains a set of subtilted music videos for the tokusatsu series Kamen Rider Kiva taken from the bonus DVD disc in the Kamen Rider Kiva Complete CD Box soundtrack. The original translations are by Railer Subs for the Destiny's Play and Individual Systems music videos, and all others were originally translated by TV-Nihon.

The subtitles have been edited for readability and grammar. This version is hardsubs on 8-bit H.264 video with AAC audio in MKV files. Please note due to the DVD using letterboxed widescreen on most of the music videos, the resolution is effectively 360p for most of these music videos after we cropped them.

We have also released other torrents of the soundtrack parts of the CD Box.

Thanks to Railer Subs and TV-Nihon for the original translations used in this release! :)

Un grup de șase fete de liceu, cu personalități de toate felurile, încearcă să facă față vieții de zi cu zi la școală: talentata Chiyo, în vârstă de 10 ani, neîndemânatica Ayumu, timida dar amabila Sakaki, răutăcioasa Tomo, ochelarista irascibilă Koyomi și băiețoasa Kagura. Împreună cu profesorii lor ciudați Kurosawa Minamo și Tanizaki Yukari, nu există zi fără incidente hazlii.

Acest torrent conține toate cele 26 de episoade, inclusiv Azumanga Web Daioh și Azumanga Daioh - Un Scurt Film.

Vizitați site-ul nostru pentru mai multe release-uri anime și live-action în română.

title: [ENG] One Piece - Vol. 100 (FULL COLOR Digital Colored Comics)
description:
Volume 100 in English, with slightly altered Viz translations. SFX translations and redraws by **Phantom Greyfire**.

A lot of time has passed since the last color volumes, and I'm no longer the only one doing this. And that's awesome! Because, honestly, doing this sucks. **Phantom Greyfire/Colored Council** got this out in record time, and did a great job. However, I still wanted to make the minor translation tweaks that I usually do, and while simply tweaking their release would have been ideal and only taken a few hours, I'm just not a fan of the upscaling, especially since these volumes were already released by Shueisha in a higher resolution than we're used to, coming in at a very nice 1444x1920. They look fantastic as-is, so I worked from the raws. If you want to upscale these, I'll leave that to you, but this resolution (and file size) works just fine for me.

**SFX**: Though I worked from the raws, I did use Phantom's SFX translations and redraws where appropriate, which made this process so much easier. SFX translations are the worst part, and I didn't see the point in needlessly redoing work that had already been done. I DID NOT ask Phantom's permission to do this, but I hope they don't mind. Phantom did a great job on these and deserves the credit for their work. You can find their release [here](https://nyaa.si/view/1856262), and you can also read it on [Colored Manga](https://coloredmanga.net/manga/oEvJq04ywoe79JL1xNfFA4YPF7DjRA).

**Standard disclaimer about the translation:** I know I make some choices that can be polarizing at times in regards to the names of people/places/things, but the reality is that there will never be a translation that will satisfy everyone. I choose to use the terminology that I personally prefer and believe to be the best choice for getting Oda's original intent across, but I know that there are many who would disagree with my choices for one reason or another. For that, I apologize, but again, there really is no pleasing everyone, especially when it comes to One Piece's translation. I hope everyone understands.

**OTHER VOLUMES:**

title: [Arid] Rascal Does Not Dream of a Sister Venturing Out (2023) (BDRip 1080p HEVC Opus) [Dual-Audio] | Seishun Buta Yarou wa Odekake Sister no Yume wo Minai | AoButa | Movie
description:
| __Credits__ | |
|---|:---:|
| TL | Aniplus / Netflix (SEA) |
| Sign TL | Chortos-2 |
| Song TL | LYAnon |
| Song Editor | Dae |
| ENC | smolkitten |
| TM | Arid |
| TS | Arid, Asakura / Aurora-Subs |
| QC | Arid, witchmary (signs) |
| Special Thanks | MantasB, Vivid (rip) |

---

**Notes:**
Audio Tracks 1 and 2 have ***Japanese Audio*** and Audio Tracks 3 and 4 have the ***English Dub Audio***, tracks 1 and 3 are stereo, tracks 2 and 4 are surround. 
Surround audio was encoded to 320kb/s with opusenc. Stereo audio was encoded to 192kb/s.
The script was retimed and TSed, and all aspects of the subtitles are matched to the original series subtitles by Vivid whenever possible. This includes the use of honorifics.
The original script is from [Netflix (South East Asia)][3]. Signs are not completely matched to the dub, they *may* be matched in a future version 2.
Thanks again to everyone who collaborated with me on this movie and Reza for buying and ripping the USBD for me. 
There is also a [Discord Server][4] you can join for future updates on my projects if you wish (also linked in the Information box).

title: [AriesArtist] Saban's Peter Pan The Animated Series (Peter Pan No Bouken) - episodes 1-5 (English)
description:
Back again with another cheesy dub.
If you don't know this is a dub of Nippon Animation's Peter Pan anime. For some reason, the only 5 episodes released in English on home video (1 DVD volume in the UK) are basically NOWHERE online (I have a feeling Nippon is behind that) and I had to do serious digging to find it in other languages at all. These 5 episodes apparently were uploaded to YouTube in the past but Nippon blocked them worldwide. As for the rest of the series in English, the Library of Congress has it. And maybe some guy in his attic too? ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
In my honest opinion, this sounds much more... mediocre than Saban's usual stuff, and for some reason episode 3 has different voice actors than the others.

Anyways, these are raw from the DVD ripped with MakeMKV, untouched as to not fib with the already low quality too much (Being that these are obviously from the 90s on top of being PAL instead of NTSC how it was made). It has double fields so I'd suggest Yadif2x for the best experience.
DDL can be found on Google Drive, to bypass torrenting and/or helping seed faster: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1jOEwc4BFpMbI4Z4p6TKG42YhRH6oaNc6?usp=drive_link
I did scans of the cover and disc for the one or two people that are probably interested in that.
I don't have much else to say on these except, uh, keep circulating them if Nippon wants to take them down so more people can see this rarity!!

(Unrelated side note: Prime Video Italy appears to have a remaster of this anime that isn't anywhere else based on the banner and preview images looking like such. Would be cool if someone could get those)

title: [DemiHuman] The Tunnel to Summer, the Exit of Goodbyes (2022) (BD Remux 1080p AVC 8 bit DTS-HD MA 5.1) [Dual-Audio] | Natsu e no Tunnel, Sayonara no Deguchi | Natsuton (Japanese, English Dubs)
description:
![](https://iili.io/dGER13v.png)

---

**About**
This is [Arg0's](https://nyaa.si/view/1762449) wonderful release with English audio and Full/Forced/SDH subs from the USBD, updated track order, names, and tagging, and more chapters.

**Motivation**
The USBD has been out for a good while now, but Arg0 hasn't updated his remux release with the better English audio. There's [YURASUKA's](https://nyaa.si/view/1784434) release, as usual, but >mini. So have a BD Remux with it. I also included the synced PGS subs from the USBD as well as its chapters.

**Notes**
You may notice that the DTS-HD MA audio for English is 16 bit instead of the expected 24, but I didn't do any lossy conversions. The track had superfluous bits i.e. was not actually 24 bit. Guess it's one of those cases where the studio ships out 16 bit audio and packages it as 24 bit.

**Movie**
[The Tunnel to Summer, the Exit of Goodbyes](https://thetvdb.com/movies/natsu-e-no-tonneru-sayonara-no-deguchi)
[Natsu e no Tunnel, Sayonara no Deguchi](https://www.themoviedb.org/movie/916192)

**Video**
AVC / 8 bit / 1080p / 16:9 / 23.976 fps / 33280 kbps / JPN BD

**Audio**
#1 Japanese / DTS-HD MA / 24 bit / 5.1 / 48 kHz / 3442 kbps / JPN BD
#2 Japanese / FLAC / 24 bit / 2.0 / 48 kHz / 1193 kbps / JPN BD
#3 Japanese (Commentary) / FLAC / 24 bit / 2.0 / 48 kHz / 1210 kbps / JPN BD
#4 English / DTS-HD MA / 16 bit / 5.1 / 48 kHz / 1509 kbps / USA BD (delayed by -1022ms)

**Subtitles**
#1 Full / English / ASS / GJM (modified)
#2 Full / English / ASS / SubsPlease (modified)
#3 Full / English / PGS / USA BD
#4 Full / English / PGS / HKG BD
#5 Full / Chinese / PGS / HKG BD
#6 Forced / English / ASS / GJM (modified)
#7 Forced / English / ASS / SubsPlease (modified)
#8 Forced / English / PGS / USA BD
#9 SDH / English / PGS / USA BD

**Chapters**
Named / USBD

**Sources**
Video / Audio 1-3 / Subtitles 1-2, 4-7 / [Arg0](https://nyaa.si/view/1762449)
Audio 4 / Subtitles 3, 8-9 / USBD [(kekku@U2)](https://u2.dmhy.org/details.php?id=55808)
Images / [Website](https://natsuton.com/)

**Staff**
Typesetting / Nyarthur / witchymary / Pasta / RogerWarr / Kametsu / petzku / Shinon
Translation / Areki / deltakei (Checking)
Editing / Lann (Dialogue) / Cruci (Songs)
Styling / Areki (Dialogue) / petzku (Songs)
Timing / Nyarthur
Quality Checking / rcombs / Areki / petzku

Thank you 3du-54n for providing me with the staff list.

**Discord**
Add me via [my username](https://discord.com/users/997090282736713760) or join [my server](https://discord.gg/NJqu5QGZAF) for progress updates and chatting :)

**Alternatives**
If you're looking for a more compact release with the USBD audio, I recommend [LostYears'](https://nyaa.si/view/1860765). It uses GJM's BD encode and Opus for all the audio. Size: 6.7 GB.

[Use MPV](https://mpv.io/) | [Website](https://natsuton.com/) | [Twitter](https://twitter.com/natsuton_anime) | [Mediainfo](https://rentry.co/DemiHuman-Tunnel-Movie/raw) | [Trailer](https://youtu.be/nlv68sEBaDg)

title: Reincarnated as an Eight-Year-Old Apostle of the Gods 001-039 as v01-10 (Digital-Compilation) (Square Enix) (Oak)
description:
**These are the digital store chapters released by Square Enix outside the Manga UP! App -- therefore these are tagged with (Square Enix).**
Chapters provided by DigitalMangaFan, denoised, grayscaled, and lossless optimized x2230 **PNG** images, split dual-pages are merged.

*These compiled volumes include raw pages from the Japanese volumes to keep the page count and numbering correct for ‘complete’ tank-style volumes.*
- These volumes start with **right-side page** first (no inner cover page), start with **two** pages on dual-view readers for correct page order.
- All image filenames are tagged and are having page numbers according to the ToC.
- Color pages from the raw tanks are included as duplicated pages marked with [color] and [color offset] (volume 1 only).

**PRE: Chapter 39 in volume 10 is a downscaled web-rip from Manga UP! Global app as this chapter is not available on digital book stores yet.**

----

Volumes 01-10 contain chapters 001-039.

title: ImoUza | My Friend's Little Sister Has It in for Me! 001-039 as v01-08 (Digital-Compilation) (Square Enix) (Oak)
description:
**These are the digital store chapters released by Square Enix outside the Manga UP! App -- therefore these are tagged with (Square Enix).**
Chapters provided by DigitalMangaFan, denoised, grayscaled, and lossless optimized x2231 **PNG** images, split dual-pages are merged.

*These compiled volumes include raw pages from the Japanese volumes to keep the page count and numbering correct for ‘complete’ tank-style volumes.*
- These volumes start with **right-side page** first (no inner cover page), start with **two** pages on dual-view readers for correct page order.
- All image filenames are tagged and are having page numbers according to the ToC.

----

Volumes 01-08 contain chapters 001-039.

title: Living With My Brother's Wife 001-150 as v01-15 (Digital-Compilation) (Square Enix) (Oak)
description:
These are the digital store chapters released by Square Enix outside the Manga UP! App – therefore these are tagged with (Square Enix).
Chapters provided by DigitalMangaFan, denoised, and lossless optimized x2231 (001-110) and x2223 (111+) **PNG** images, split dual-pages are merged and fixed where needed.

*These compiled volumes include raw pages from the Japanese volumes to keep the page count and numbering correct for ‘complete’ tank-style volumes.*
- These volumes start with **right-side page** first (no inner cover page), start with **two** pages on dual-view readers for correct page order.
- All image filenames are tagged and are having page numbers according to the ToC.
- Color pages from the raw tanks are included as duplicated pages marked with [color] and [color offset] (Volumes 1-7 and 9 only).
- Volume omake scanlated by [0mniessence](https://mangadex.org/group/8fec21d3-2363-4c6f-8207-e07d525b5fa8/0mniessence) and re-TS on other raws by Oak for volumes 1-8.
- Volume omake scanlated by Oak for volumes 9-14.

*Note: For volume 14, chapters 130 and 131 were swapped by Square Enix, they are now ordered according to the tankoban.*
*Note: For volume 15, the last page of chapter 150 is replaced by two revised (tankoban) pages, scanlated by Oak.*

----

Volumes 01-15 contain chapters 001-150.
[Other Chapters, Web Rip Compilations, or Digital Store Rip Compilations](https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=3_1&q=living+brother+wife+digital)

title: [MTBB] Baccano! (DVD 480p)
description:
Making DVD releases is annoying, and watching them is annoying, but anime studios' upscales of SD anime were so trash in the 2000s and 2010s that a competent DVD release will always be better than watching a Blu-Ray version (to some extent and in some respects).

The primary problems with the Blu-Ray version of Baccano are temporal instability (lines shimmer in the BD version where they didn't in the original) and odd borders around blood patches and such. Also, some 30fps content was brought down to 24fps, like the eyecatch graphics.

The primary problems with the DVD version of Baccano are that it's impossible to watch comfortably without a competent encode, which this is, and the fact that like all DVDs, it has catastrophic compression artifacting in many high-motion scenes. Because of the compression issues, the Blu-Ray OP has been spliced in here.

I don't particularly recommend one viewing experience over the other. The show is good no matter how you watch it, and the same goes for these subs. I made this release so that people would stop talking about how people should be watching Baccano on a DVD remux instead of on a BD encode. I get frustrated when people recommend an arguably inferior and inarguably unavailable viewing option, discouraging people from actually watching the damn show—one that I like and put a lot of work into the script for. (Note: this isn't a shot at sneedex listing "DVD Remux + ?", but rather at the typical responses on discord when random people ask "how should I watch Baccano")

Feel free to report IVTC problems if you see them. I will probably redo the encodes if there are any. Exception: don't bother reporting problems with crossfades. I did my best on those already, so you'll have to make your own encode if you're unhappy with them.

For those who care, the PAR used here was 2560:2133.

title: [Kyoma] AKIRA Colored - Epic Comics (Upscaled)
description:
#### **2x upscale of all 38 issues of AKIRA by Epic Comics**

***These are considered to be the first digitally colored "comics", by colorist Steve Oliff.***

In the late 80s, editor Archie Goodwin came to Katsuhiro Otomo and asked him to localize Akira in English. It would be published by Marvel Comics' imprint Epic Comics. Otomo said yes, but then came the frustrating task of localizing it.

Jo Duffy wrote the localization, Michael Higgins did the lettering, and Katsuhiro Otomo himself redid the art so that it would make sense in English.

***
![](https://i.imgur.com/goVvsz6.png)

***
#### Upscaled with ```4xRealWebPhoto_v3_atd``` model based on the recently released [**Adaptive-Token-Dictionary**](https://github.com/LabShuHangGU/Adaptive-Token-Dictionary) Network.

The model does a great job of removing compression artifacts, keeping the line art from getting wobbly, and preserving most of the screentone patterns. Out of all the models I’ve tried, this is probably the only one where the output doesn’t look like a smeary mess. The only downside is a slight color shift.

#### **Comparisons**: https://slow.pics/c/ERsXxXO7

***

***Resulting images were downscaled to 2200px then saved as **q97(4:4:4)** jpegs, encoded with*** **```JPEGLI```** 

Link to the model used:
**4xRealWebPhoto_v3_atd**: https://openmodeldb.info/models/4x-RealWebPhoto-v3-atd

#### **Reading Direction**:➡️Left to Right

### [**DDL**](https://mega.nz/folder/MscXlAiZ#36OTlE6mhZVDqWXrO86Xgg)

title: [2024.08.16] hololive-EN Mori Calliope メジャー2ndアルバム「PHANTOMIME」[MP3 320K]
description:
![cover](https://i.postimg.cc/Fssnb9kM/cover-01.jpg)  
  
英語圏VTuberグループで活動するVTuber、Mori Calliope(モリカリオペ)のMajor 1st ALBUM『SINDERELLA』以来、約1年半ぶりとなる2ndフルアルバムの発売決定！アルバムタイトルの『PHANTOMIME』は“PHANTOME(幻影)”と“PANTOMIME(パントマイム)”を組み合わせた造語となっており、ヴァーチャルアーティストであるMori Calliope(PHANTOME)が、“パフォーマンス(PANTOMIME)”をして奮闘している様子を表現。他人のために生きるのではなく、自分のために生きて、苦悩の中にも希望を見出したいというメッセージ性が込められた作品となっています。2024年4月に配信され注目を集めた日本を代表するアーティストであるAIとのコラボ曲「タイド」や、TVアニメ『異世界スーサイド・スクワッド』エンディングテーマとなった「Go-Getters」、『メタルギア』公式コラボソング「SNEAKING」他、収録！  
  
Tracklist  
1. タイド  
歌 : Mori Calliope、AI  
  
2. SNEAKING (revenge)  
歌 : Mori Calliope、Lotus Juice  
  
3. Go-Getters  
  
4. Overkill  
  
5. Cult Following  
  
6. DONMAI  
  
7. Midnight Mayoi (feat. Kobo Kanaeru)  
  
8. skeletons  
  
9. Last Days  
  
10. through the blue  
  
11. Go-Getters (feat. YOON)

description:
#### Raw subs were *accidently* included with this mkv. Make sure to select the right subtitles! (labeled as "English [chasa]") They are default, but just check anyways.
 
---

Changes for v2/3:
- Added/Fixed tracking for Rin's script
- Fixed bad/wrong word at 7:24 (this was in raw)
- Improved tracking for some signs
- Added missing fonts (oops)

---

Hi everyone!

Sorry for late upload. I was coming back from holiday! (So annoying that the episode I hope I can do quickly was the one that involved the most work lmao)

Well, there was a lot of typesetting for me today! Entire text conversations without type setting? Outrageous! (jk, at least it was translated)

JPN text has been masked when necessary (with outlines, but done well).

---

I plan to upload within 1-2 hours of the episode being released on official streaming sites, so I hope you can rely on me!

[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/jbVBTmUYbw) is available for public qc, questions, or if you need to contact me.

### Changes:
- Added OP/ED subs
- Restyled ED subs (for new ED)
- Added missing typesetting (mainly the text convos)
- Did some fancy masking when necessary (ooooo!) (see 5th screenshot)
- Restyled typesetting
- Restyled dialogue
- Removed the random text added on one of the lines (awesome)

### Credits:
- washed: ED TL

- AVC Video
- Japanese Audio (AAC-LC)
- English Subs (ASS)
